★ ★ ★
Who We Are

Three Different Ones

Three Different Ones is Seattle's premier Pink Floyd tribute band — three musicians from three different worlds, united by a deep reverence for one of the greatest rock acts of all time.

A guitarist from Mexico, a bassist from Brazil, and a drummer from El Salvador — three backgrounds, three stories, one sound. The name says it all.

Equal parts sweat-soaked club shows and faithful recreations of the Floyd sound — complete with lap steel, visuals, and that signature atmospheric depth. From Wish You Were Here to The Wall, we bring the full Pink Floyd experience to the Pacific Northwest and beyond.

Oz Alcantara
Vocals / Guitar
Denis Monteiro
Bass / Vocals
Rene Monjaras
Drums
